name: trustabl
description: Self-audit AI agent, tool, and MCP-server code for security and reliability misconfigurations with Trustabl, the static analyzer for the OpenAI Agents SDK, Claude Agent SDK, Google ADK, and MCP. Ships two skills (trustabl-scan and trustabl-enrich) and a subagent (trustabl) that together form a scan → enrich → review → apply pipeline.
